title: Monitoring compliance with Kenya's shisha ban in select public hospitality venues in Nairobi
author: Fukuda, Simone
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This is the accepted manuscript version of the work published in its final form as Pepi, M. J., Chacko, S., Marqus, G. M., Singh, V., Wang, Z., Planck, K., Cullinane, R. T., Meka, P. N., Gollapalli, D. R., Ioerger, T. R., Rhee, K. Y., Cuny, G. D., Boshoff, H. I., & Hedstrom, L. (2022). A <scp>d</scp>-Phenylalanine-Benzoxazole Derivative Reveals the Role of the Essential Enzyme Rv3603c in the Pantothenate Biosynthetic Pathway of <i>Mycobacterium tuberculosis</i>.  ACS Infectious Diseases ,  8 (2), 330-342.  https://doi.org/10.1021/acsinfecdis.1c00461
